name: Welcome
description: Welcome to ofis square

content.emailSubject: Welcome to OFIS SQUARE | Action Required to Activate Workspace
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

Thank you for choosing OFIS SQUARE. We are pleased to confirm that your onboarding process has been initiated.

To ensure a seamless transition into your new workspace, please complete the following steps via our member portal:

Profile Details: Complete your professional bio.
KYC Verification: Securely upload the required documentation.
Payment: Process any outstanding invoices.

How to Access the Portal
You can log in to our member portal or download the OFIS SQUARE App using your registered mobile number.

Warm regards,
Member Experience Team OFIS SQUARE

name: Onboarding Initiated - Welcome
description: Welcome email sent when a client’s onboarding process is initiated.

content.emailSubject: Welcome to OFIS SQUARE | Action Required to Activate Workspace
content.emailText:
{{greeting}}
Dear {{memberName}},

Welcome to OFIS SQUARE. Your onboarding process has been successfully initiated.

Action Required to Activate Workspace

Thank you for choosing OFIS SQUARE. We’re excited to have you with us.

To ensure a seamless transition into your new workspace, please complete the following steps via our member portal:

- Profile Details: Complete your professional bio
- KYC Verification: Securely upload the required documents
- Payment: Process any outstanding invoices

How to Access the Portal
You can log in to our member portal or download the OFIS SQUARE App using your registered mobile number.

Warm regards,
Member Experience Team
OFIS SQUARE

name: Platform Access - Welcome
description: Email sent when a user is added to the OFIS SQUARE platform.

content.emailSubject: Welcome to OFIS SQUARE | Your Workspace Portal is Ready
content.emailText:
Dear Member,

Welcome to OFIS SQUARE. We are excited to have you on board!

Your account has been successfully created, giving you full access to our digital ecosystem. Through the OFIS SQUARE platform, you can manage your bookings, connect with the community, and access essential workspace services.

Get Started:
Web Portal: Access your dashboard here: {{link}}
Mobile App: Download the OFIS SQUARE app from the App Store or Google Play.

How to Log In:
1. Visit the link or open the app.
2. Select "Forgot Password" to set up your unique credentials.
Alternatively, use the OTP Authentication for a secure, password-less login.

Best regards,
The OFIS SQUARE Team

name: Ticket Resolved
description: Ticket resolved notification.

content.emailSubject: Support Update: Your Request [Ticket ID: {{id}}] has been Resolved
content.emailText:
{{greeting}}
Dear {{memberName}},

We are writing to inform you that your support request regarding {{category}} (Ticket ID: {{id}}) has been marked as resolved. Our team has completed the necessary actions to address your concerns.

If you find that the issue persists, or if you have any follow-up questions, please do not hesitate to reach out. To maintain an organized support history, we kindly ask that you raise a new ticket via the OFIS SQUARE platform for any unrelated matters.

Thank you for your patience.

name: Invoice Generated
description: Invoice generated for upcoming billing period.

content.emailSubject: Action Required: Your OFIS SQUARE Invoice for {{billingPeriod}} is Now Available

name: Pending KYC Documents
description: Reminder to upload pending KYC documents.

content.sms: Action required: Please upload your pending KYC documents.
content.emailSubject: Subject: Important: Action Required – Complete Your KYC Verification
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

To comply with regulatory requirements and maintain a secure environment for all members, we require the completion of your Know Your Customer (KYC) documentation.

Our records indicate that your profile is currently incomplete. Please upload the necessary identification documents through the OFIS SQUARE mobile app or web portal at your earliest convenience.

Please Note: Failure to complete this verification may result in a temporary restriction or revocation of your access.

Required Action: Log in to your account > Profile Settings > KYC Upload.

name: Credits Exhausted
description: Alert when all available credits are consumed.

content.sms: All credits have been consumed. Please recharge.
content.emailSubject: Action Required: Your OFIS SQUARE Credit Balance is Exhausted
content.emailText:
{{greeting}}
Dear {{memberName}},

We are writing to inform you that your OFIS SQUARE credit balance has reached zero. All available credits in your account have been fully consumed.

To maintain access to our premium services—including meeting room reservations, guest invitations, and printing facilities—please perform a top-up at your earliest convenience via the app or web portal.

Please Note: Any pending or recurring bookings may be affected if your balance remains at zero.

Best regards,
Team OFIS SQUARE

name: Sales Senior Commercials Approval
description: Approval required by sales senior.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Pending Approval: New Client Commercials & Profile | {{building}}
content.emailText:
Dear {{managerName}},

A new client profile and its associated commercial terms have been submitted for your review and formal approval for the {{building}} location.

Submission Overview:
Property: {{building}}
Client Name: {{companyName}}

Required Action: Please log in to the OFIS SQUARE Platform and navigate to the "Approvals" dashboard to review the contract details, pricing structures, and terms.

Best regards,
Operations Team OFIS SQUARE

name: Legal Team – Contract Upload
description: Notify legal to upload final contract.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Action Required: Legal Review & Contract Upload | {{companyName}}
content.emailText:
Dear Legal Team,

This is to inform you that the commercial terms for {{companyName}} have been officially approved. We are now ready to move into the contracting phase.

Please review the approved commercial parameters and proceed with the generation and upload of the final agreement via the OFIS SQUARE platform.

Your timely review is essential to maintain the scheduled onboarding timeline.

Best regards,
Operations Department OFIS SQUARE

name: Payment Reminder
description: Reminder for pending invoice payment.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Urgent Reminder: Pending Invoice for Your OFIS SQUARE Account
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

This is a friendly reminder that we have not yet received payment for your current billing period invoice.

To avoid late payment fees or a potential disruption to your services, we kindly request that you complete the transaction at your earliest convenience. Payments can be processed instantly through the "Billing" section of the OFIS SQUARE mobile application or web portal.

If you have already made the payment, please disregard this email.

name: Ticket Created
description: Ticket received and confirmed.

content.emailSubject: Ticket Received and Confirmed: {{id}}

name: Meeting Room Booking Confirmed
description: Confirmation for meeting room booking.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Booking Confirmed: Your Meeting at {{building}}

name: Low Credit Balance Alert
description: Alert when credits are low.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Low Balance Alert: Your OFIS SQUARE Credits are Running Low
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

This is an automated notification to inform you that your OFIS SQUARE credit balance has reached a minimum threshold. You currently have {{remainingCredits}} credits remaining in your account.

To ensure uninterrupted access to meeting room bookings and printing, we recommend recharging your balance via the App or Web Portal.

Best regards,
Team OFIS SQUARE

name: Payment Failed
description: Notification when payment fails.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Urgent: Payment Unsuccessful for Your OFIS SQUARE Booking
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

We were unable to process the payment for your recent booking at OFIS SQUARE. As a result, your reservation is currently unconfirmed and may be released if payment is not finalized shortly.

How to Resolve This:
1. Retry Payment via the App or Web Portal.
2. Verify Payment Method details.

If you believe this is an error, please contact support.

Best regards,
Team OFIS SQUARE

name: Important Announcement
description: Broadcast important updates.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Important Update Regarding Your OFIS SQUARE Experience
content.emailText:
Dear Member,

We would like to share an important update regarding our facilities/policies that may affect your experience. To ensure you have all the necessary details, we have published a comprehensive announcement on our digital platforms.

How to view the update:
Mobile App: Check the "Announcements" section.
Web Portal: Navigate to the "Updates" tab.

Thank you for being a valued part of our network.

name: Draft Payment Approved
description: Draft payment approved.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Payment Confirmation: Your OFIS SQUARE Account is Up to Date
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

We are pleased to confirm that your recent payment has been verified and successfully processed.

The amount has been credited to your account, and your billing statement for the current period is now marked as Paid. You may continue to enjoy uninterrupted access to all OFIS SQUARE facilities.

Updated Account Status:
Applied Amount: {{amount}}

Your official receipt is available for download via the app.

We appreciate your continued partnership.

name: Day Pass Booking Confirmed
description: Confirmation for day pass.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Confirmation: Your Day Pass at {{building}} is Ready!
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

We are pleased to confirm your Day Pass booking at OFIS SQUARE. We look forward to providing you with a productive and seamless workspace experience.

Your Booking Summary:
Location: {{building}}
Date: {{date}}

Upon Arrival: Please present a digital copy of this confirmation at the front desk. Our community team will provide you with your access credentials.

Best regards,
Team OFIS SQUARE

name: Guest Arrival
description: Notify member when guest arrives.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Guest Arrival: {{guestName}} is waiting at Reception
content.emailText:
{{greeting}}
Dear {{memberName}},

This is a courtesy notification to let you know that your guest {{guestName}} has arrived and is waiting for you at the reception.

Please proceed to the reception area to welcome them.

Regards,
Team OFIS SQUARE

name: Sales Junior Commercials Rejected
description: Commercials rejected notification.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Revision Required: Commercials for {{companyName}} at {{building}}
content.emailText:
Dear {{salesAssociateName}},

Please be advised that the commercial terms submitted for {{building}} have been reviewed and were not approved at this time.

Reason for Rejection: "{{reason}}"

Next Steps: To proceed, please address the feedback, edit the parameters in the "Leads" section, and resubmit.

Regards,
Approvals Desk OFIS SQUARE

name: Meeting Room Booking Reminder
description: Reminder for today’s meeting.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Reminder: Your Meeting Today at {{meetingRoom}}

name: Service Payment Successful
description: Generic notification sent when a service payment is successfully processed.

content.sms: Payment successful for {{serviceType}} at {{buildingName}}. Ref: {{transactionId}}. Amount: ₹{{amount}}.
content.emailSubject: Payment Successful – {{serviceType}} | {{buildingName}}

name: Draft Payment Submitted
description: Draft payment under review.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Payment Acknowledgment: Your Transaction is Being Processed
content.emailText:
Dear {{memberName}},

We have successfully received the payment details/draft submitted for your OFIS SQUARE account.

Please be advised that your payment is currently in the verification stage. Our finance team is reviewing the transaction to ensure all details are reconciled correctly.

Reference ID: {{draftPaymentId}}
Status: Pending Verification

Thank you for your patience.

name: Senior Management Approval
description: Executive review required.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Executive Approval Required: Final Contract for {{companyName}}
content.emailText:
Dear {{managerName}},

The legal contract for {{companyName}} has been finalized and uploaded following the approval of the commercial terms. The file is now pending your executive review.

Client Name: {{companyName}}
Status: Legal Review Complete – Awaiting Senior Sign-off

Please access the Management Portal to authorize the contract.

Best regards,
Operations Control OFIS SQUARE

name: RSVP Confirmation
description: Event RSVP confirmation.

content.emailSubject: Subject: Confirmation: You’re on the Guest List for {{eventName}}!

name: Community Ticket Created
description: Notify community team of new ticket.

content.emailSubject: New Support Ticket Raised - {{buildingName}}

name: Ticket Assigned to User
description: Notify user when a ticket is assigned to them.

content.emailSubject: Ticket Assigned to You: {{ticketId}}

name: Visitor Scheduled – Notify Host
description: Notification sent to host member informing them about scheduled visitor details.

content.sms: Visitor {{visitorName}} is scheduled to meet you on {{visitDate}} at {{visitTime}} at {{buildingName}}.
content.emailSubject: Visitor Scheduled to Meet You – {{visitorName}} | {{visitDate}}

name: Finance – Draft Payment Review Required
description: Notify finance role users when a client submits a draft payment for review and approval.

content.emailSubject: Action Required – Draft Payment Submitted by {{companyName}}

name: Pro Forma Invoice Approval Required
description: Notification sent to finance team when a new pro forma invoice needs approval.

content.emailSubject: Approval Required – Pro Forma Invoice | {{buildingName}}

name: Pro Forma Invoice Sent to Client
description: Notification sent to the client when a pro forma invoice is officially sent.

content.emailSubject: Pro Forma Invoice - {{buildingName}}

name: Admin Invoice Batch Summary
description: Consolidated notification for System Admins summarizing a processed batch of invoices/estimates.

content.emailSubject: [Admin] Monthly Invoice Pipeline Summary - {{date}}

name: Contract Comment Added
description: Notification sent to stakeholders when a comment is added to a contract.

content.emailSubject: New Comment on Contract #{{contractIdShort}}
content.emailHtml:
Contract ID: #{{contractIdShort}}

Client: {{companyName}}

Status: {{status}}

Added by: {{addedBy}}

Comment:

{{comment}}

View the full contract details in your dashboard.

name: Contract Admin Approved
description: Notification sent to stakeholders when a contract is approved by an admin.

content.emailSubject: ✅ Contract Approved - #{{contractIdShort}}
content.emailHtml:
Great news! The contract has been approved by admin.

Contract ID: #{{contractIdShort}}

Client: {{companyName}}

Status: {{status}}

Approved At: {{approvedAt}}

Next Steps:

  • Send contract to client for review
  • Await client approval
  • Generate stamp paper after client approval

name: Contract Client Review Request
description: Notification sent to the client when the contract is ready for their review.

content.emailSubject: Contract Ready for Your Review - Ofis Square
content.emailHtml:
Your workspace contract is ready for your review and approval.

Contract Details:

Building: {{building}}

Capacity: {{peopleCount}} people

Monthly Rent: ₹{{monthlyRent}}

Contract Period: {{startDate}} - {{endDate}}

To review and approve your contract:

  1. Login to your client portal
  2. Navigate to the Contracts section
  3. Review the contract details
  4. Approve or provide feedback
Login to Portal

name: Contract Client Feedback Alert
description: Notification sent to stakeholders when a client provides feedback on a contract.

content.emailSubject: Client Feedback Received - Contract #{{contractIdShort}}
content.emailText:
{{greeting}}

The client has provided feedback on the contract #{{contractIdShort}}.

Client Feedback:
{{feedback}}

Action Required:
- Review the client's feedback
- Make necessary changes to the contract
- Re-send the contract to the client for approval
content.emailHtml:
The client has provided feedback on the contract.

Contract ID: #{{contractIdShort}}

Client: {{companyName}}

Client Feedback:

{{feedback}}

Action Required:

  • Review the client's feedback
  • Make necessary changes to the contract
  • Re-send the contract to the client for approval

name: Contract Sent for Signature
description: Notification sent to stakeholders when a contract is sent for e-signature.

content.emailSubject: ✍️ Contract Sent for E-Signature - #{{contractIdShort}}
content.emailHtml:
The contract has been sent to the client for digital signature via Zoho Sign.

Contract ID: #{{contractIdShort}}

Client: {{companyName}}

Building: {{building}}

Status: Awaiting Client Signature

Sent At: {{sentAt}}

Next Steps:

  • Client will receive an email from Zoho Sign
  • Client will review and sign the document digitally
  • You will be notified once the contract is signed

name: Contract Signed Confirmation
description: Notification sent to stakeholders when a contract is signed by the client.

content.emailSubject: 🎉 Contract Signed Successfully - #{{contractIdShort}}
content.emailHtml:
✅ Contract has been digitally signed by the client

Contract ID: #{{contractIdShort}}

Client: {{companyName}}

Building: {{building}}

Status: Signed & Active

Signed At: {{signedAt}}

Next Steps:

  • Contract is now legally binding and active
  • Client onboarding can proceed
  • Workspace allocation can be finalized
  • Invoicing can be initiated

Congratulations on successfully closing this contract! 🎊
